posts.title: AI Code Review Assistant Launch 🚀
posts.description: Introduced AI-powered code review inside terminal using run-git. Privacy-first, local LLM-based commit message generation that's changing how developers work.

posts.title: RAG System Deployment Journey
posts.description: Successfully deployed a production RAG system for document Q&A. Learnings on retrieval pipelines, embedding optimization, and handling edge cases.

posts.title: Building AutoML Studio from Scratch
posts.description: End-to-end ML platform that automates EDA, preprocessing, training, and evaluation. Democratizing machine learning for everyone.

posts.title: Open Source Milestone: 50+ Stars
posts.description: Hit 50+ GitHub stars across my projects! Grateful for the amazing developer community. Open source is about sharing knowledge.

posts.title: Learning in Public
posts.description: Why I believe in learning by building — not just consuming tutorials. Sharing everything publicly has accelerated my growth 10x.
